description: Single authoritative Challenge/Career landing score. Phase penalties affect only their owning phase; pause usage, reduced simulation rate, and cockpit-view exits are general penalties on the combined score.
formula: phaseAfterPenalties = phaseScore * product(phase penalty multipliers); subtotal = sum(phaseAfterPenalties * phaseWeightPercent / 100); final = round(subtotal * product(general penalty multipliers), 1)

pauseUsage.penaltyDescription: Normal pause and Active Pause are prohibited from the first unpaused challenge-flight sample through main-gear touchdown. This general factor applies to the combined score.

simulationRate.penaltyDescription: Reducing the simulation rate below normal speed before touchdown applies this general factor to the combined score once.

cockpitView.penaltyDescription: Each transition from cockpit view (CAMERA STATE 2) to any exterior or other non-cockpit camera multiplies the combined score by 0.95. Multiple exits stack multiplicatively from the first unpaused challenge sample through main-gear touchdown.

contactStability.penaltyDescription: The initial landing is the baseline. One valid airborne/recontact cycle (the second touchdown) multiplies the Touchdown phase by 0.9; two or more cycles (the third touchdown or later) multiply it by 0.8.

gear.penaltyDescription: If gear is required and up, multiply the Touchdown phase by 0.1. Gear down is the required baseline and awards no points.

flaps.penaltyDescription: If flaps are not set for landing (index below min / above max), multiply the Touchdown phase by 0.8. Correct flaps award no points.

spoilerDeployment.penaltyDescription: Both left and right spoiler surfaces must deploy at least 15% no later than two seconds after the accepted main-gear touchdown; failure multiplies the Touchdown phase.

noseGearImpact.penaltyDescription: A moderate nose-gear impact multiplies the Touchdown phase by 0.95; a severe impact multiplies it by 0.9. The worst verified nose contact or recontact applies once.

metrics.note: Initial main-gear impact only. Combines challenge-specific touchdown vertical-speed and robust filtered peak-G subscores using weighted RMS penalties.

Longitudinal position of the first accepted main-gear touchdown. The perfect point is 1,100 ft from the landing threshold on runways up to and including 6,000 ft, otherwise 1,200 ft. Early and late errors score equally.
Measures actual runway consumed after a sustained near-level or positive vertical-speed state begins below flare height. IAS scoring is not reused.
Target-accuracy metric. The target is VAPP minus 5 kt by default. Being fast is already punished more heavily than being slow.
Touchdown lateral offset. Full score within ~half a strip width; zero near runway edge on a typical narrow runway.

phases.note: Short final (≈0.2–4.5 NM, includes typical 4 NM spawn): average 3° path match, vertical steadiness, lateral steadiness, and bank stability. Bank is 20%; the three path metrics share the remaining 80%.

stallWarning.penaltyDescription: If a stall warning occurs at any time after the attempt is armed, multiply the Approach phase by 0.5. No stall warning is the required baseline and awards no points.

automation.penaltyDescription: Heading and altitude hold must be off at or below 2000 ft RA. AP master/AP1/AP2 and active or armed autothrust must be off at or below 1000 ft RA; failure multiplies the Approach phase. Flight directors may remain on.

metrics.note: Time-weighted mean absolute altitude error vs the runway glideslope path (default 3°; challenge-set or free-flight VASI/PAPI-derived angle). The normalized unflared aim point is 1,000 ft past the landing threshold. High and low deviations cannot cancel.
Total vertical path pumping: Σ|Δe| / T. Steady path scores high; large corrections and oscillations score low.
Total lateral path change: Σ|Δd| / ground distance. Straight track scores high; big corrections and S-turns score low.
Time-weighted mean absolute bank on short final: ∫|φ|dt / T. Wings level scores high (full credit within 2°); sustained bank and left/right rocking score low (zero by 18° mean |bank|).

phases.note: Heading, centerline path, weave, and peak lateral deviation share the phase equally.

manualBraking.penaltyDescription: Manual brake pedals must remain released while the nose gear is airborne. Within four seconds of nose-gear touchdown either both pedals must be applied or autobrake must be active. Failure multiplies the Rollout phase.

rollout.penaltyDescription: As soon as groundspeed falls below the settle threshold, remaining runway must be at least max(400 m, 15% of runway length). Falling short multiplies the Rollout phase by 0.8.

reverseThrust.penaltyDescription: Every engine operating at main-gear touchdown must select at least idle reverse no later than TD+4 seconds, and all reversers must be completely stowed by 60 kt groundspeed. Failure multiplies the Rollout phase once.

metrics.note: Mean fuselage heading error after the configured de-crab delay until settling.
Distance-weighted mean |offset| on rollout. Full score within a few metres; zero near a typical runway edge (~half-width).
